title: Transcriptomics and epigenomics datasets of primary brain cancers in formalin-fixed paraffin embedded format.
author: Garcia-Heredia A Guerra-Nunez L Martin-Climent P Rojas E Lopez-Dominguez R Alcantara-Dominguez C Alenda C Valor LM
content: S-EPMC11830079 PMC11830079 Transcriptomics and epigenomics datasets of primary brain cancers in formalin-fixed paraffin embedded format. The access of public omics-based datasets is of paramount importance in brain cancer research as allows the proposal and validation of both biomarkers
